name: Apricot Crispy Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine and marshmallows in a pot over low heat.
2. Stir in apricots and Rice Krispies until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a 9 by 13-inch pan and spread evenly.
4. Chill the mixture for at least an hour to set.
5. Cut into squares or bars before serving.
